playbook.intent: From a cold inbound DM/email to a countersigned monthly retainer with first invoice paid, run a deterministic pipeline that filters bad-fit clients early, prices the engagement defensively, and locks payment terms before any work starts.
playbook.scope: From a cold inbound DM/email to a countersigned monthly retainer with first invoice paid, run a deterministic pipeline that filters bad-fit clients early, prices the engagement defensively, and locks payment terms before any work starts.

success-criteria.criterion: Propose + price stage complete: Retainer proposal sent
Negotiate + sign stage complete: Countersigned retainer

stage.name: Triage

tasks.task: Apply triage scoring rubric to the inbound message
Disqualify if any red flag hit
Schedule discovery only with qualified leads

stage.decision-gate: Advance only with explicit score and decision documented.

stage.name: Discovery
stage.intent: Run discovery using Mom Test; emerge with hypothesis.
stage.decision-gate: Advance only if discovery confirms budget + decision-maker access.

stage.name: Propose + price
stage.intent: Send a retainer proposal with defensive pricing and anchoring.

tasks.task: Pick fixed vs hourly vs retainer
Compute price using rate floor + risk uplift

stage.decision-gate: Advance only when proposal includes deposit + 3 anchored options.

stage.name: Negotiate + sign
stage.intent: Handle redlines; close with deposit before any work.

tasks.task: Walk through redlines on a call
Lock contract clauses (IP, termination, payment terms)

stage.decision-gate: Cycle closes only when deposit clears. No deposit, no kickoff.

extra.value: [Hiring employees or building a team — solo operator throughout, Enterprise procurement processes — SMB / startup buyers only]
[Active freelance practice with at least one paying client, A bookkeeping / time-tracking baseline in place]
[Treating decision_gate as a suggestion — playbook collapses to a checklist if gates are not enforced, Skipping written artifacts because 'it's in my head' — kills traceability and future re-use]
['Did every stage produce a written artifact a stranger could read?', 'Did I actually advance only when the decision_gate criterion was met?']

{human: faion get-content inbound-to-signed-retainer --format md, agent: faion get-content inbound-to-signed-retainer --format context, json: faion get-content inbound-to-signed-retainer --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial draft for F-064 P3 technical-freelancer persona, synthesis angle'}]
